programs.title: Dragon Ball Super
programs.sub_title: Protect The Supreme Kai Gowasu Destroy Zamasu!
programs.desc: Supreme Kai Gowasu is in grave danger! Now that gods are involved, Zamasu's treachery isn't a mortal matter anymore. Beerus will have to take matters into his own hands.

programs.title: Dragon Ball Super
programs.sub_title: Into The Future Again Goku Black's True Identity Revealed!
programs.desc: Beerus is convinced that his actions should have influenced the future, but Future Trunks isn't so sure! Now it's time for Goku, Vegeta and Future Trunks to see for themselves - and Bulma is going, too!

programs.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programs.desc: A classy queen of etiquette makes the Utoniums question their superhero way of life.

programs.title: The Next Step
programs.desc: As the Regionals qualifier clashes with the Brawl's, A-Troupe struggles under the weight of all the secrets they've kept from each other.

programs.title: Horrible Histories
programs.desc: A Victorian businessman goes undercover in his own factory; there's a right royal squabble over who should rule medieval England and the Real Tudor Hustle reveals the cleverest con tricks by naughty historical criminals.

programs.title: Odd Squad
programs.desc: Olive and Otto interrogate two suspects to figure out which one is guilty.
